classData.comment:
/**
         * Back-reference to the owning grid.Container (the macro layer). grid.View orchestrates the
         * 1-3 bodies (`bodyStart`, `body`, `bodyEnd`) but reaches up to the container for macro state
         * it does not own — column distribution and the ScrollManager (horizontal scroll position plus
         * main-thread scroll/hover/pinning addon coordination).
         * @member {Neo.grid.Container|null} gridContainer=null
         */
classData.description: Back-reference to the owning grid.Container (the macro layer). grid.View orchestrates the 1-3 bodies (bodyStart, body, bodyEnd) but reaches up to the container for macro state it does not own — column distribution and the ScrollManager (horizontal scroll position plus main-thread scroll/hover/pinning addon coordination).
classData.name: gridContainer
layout

classData.comment:
/**
         * The current scroll top position of the grid view
         * @member {Number} scrollTop_=0
         */
classData.description: The current scroll top position of the grid view
classData.name: scrollTop_

classData.comment:
/**
         * The single SelectionModel owned by grid.View (the body orchestrator) — NOT by an individual
         * grid.Body. `bodyStart`/`body`/`bodyEnd` are pure render/event delegates; selection state is
         * keyed by recordId and spans all bodies, replacing the per-body cloned models plus the
         * `getActivePeers()` fan-out (the multi-body SelectionModel design-lock).
         * @member {Neo.selection.grid.BaseModel|null} selectionModel_=null
         */
classData.description: The single SelectionModel owned by grid.View (the body orchestrator) — NOT by an individual grid.Body. bodyStart/body/bodyEnd are pure render/event delegates; selection state is keyed by recordId and spans all bodies, replacing the per-body cloned models plus the getActivePeers() fan-out (the multi-body SelectionModel design-lock).
classData.name: selectionModel_

classData.description: The active bodies in visual order (bodyStart, body, bodyEnd) — the render/event delegates the single View-owned SelectionModel spans for cross-body selection state.
classData.name: bodies

classData.description: The selected-record annotation field. Body-agnostic — delegates to the center body.
classData.name: selectedRecordField

classData.description: The Store is owned by the macro layer (gridContainer); the View-owned SelectionModel reads it here rather than through an individual body.
classData.name: store

classData.comment:
/**
     * Triggered after the selectionModel config got changed. Registers grid.View (not a body) as the
     * model's `view`, so a single model owns selection state across all bodies.
     * @param {Neo.selection.Model} value
     * @param {Neo.selection.Model} oldValue
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: Triggered after the selectionModel config got changed. Registers grid.View (not a body) as the model's view, so a single model owns selection state across all bodies.
classData.name: afterSetSelectionModel

classData.comment:
/**
     * Triggered before the selectionModel config gets changed. Defaults to a RowModel — the same
     * default the per-body path used, now instantiated once at the grid.View (orchestrator) level.
     * @param {Neo.selection.Model} value
     * @param {Neo.selection.Model} oldValue
     * @returns {Neo.selection.Model}
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: Triggered before the selectionModel config gets changed. Defaults to a RowModel — the same default the per-body path used, now instantiated once at the grid.View (orchestrator) level.
classData.name: beforeSetSelectionModel

classData.description: Resolves the dataField for a logical cell id (recordId__dataField). Body-agnostic — delegates to the center body.
classData.name: getDataField

classData.comment:
/**
     * Resolves the logical cell id (`recordId__dataField`) for a record + field. Body-agnostic —
     * delegates to the center body.
     * @param {Object} record
     * @param {String} dataField
     * @returns {String}
     */
classData.description: Resolves the logical cell id (recordId__dataField) for a record + field. Body-agnostic — delegates to the center body.
classData.name: getLogicalCellId

classData.description: Resolves the data record for a logical cell id. Body-agnostic — delegates to the center body.
classData.name: getRecordFromLogicalId

classData.description: Resolves the stable record id for a record. Body-agnostic — delegates to the center body.
classData.name: getRecordId
getVdomUpdateMeta

classData.comment:
/**
     * Scrolls the grid by a number of rows. Delegates to the center body (the scroll authority).
     * @param {Number} index
     * @param {Number} step
     */
classData.description: Scrolls the grid by a number of rows. Delegates to the center body (the scroll authority).
classData.name: scrollByRows

classData.comment:
/**
     * Pushes synchronized scrolling coordinates (startIndex / scrollTop) into all active bodies
     * (`bodyStart`, `body`, `bodyEnd`). Owned here because grid.View is the body orchestrator; the
     * horizontal scroll position is read from the gridContainer macro layer, which retains the
     * ScrollManager.
     *
     * Preserves the row/cell pooling invariant: each body recomputes view data for a fixed node pool
     * via the silent `createViewData(true)` path — never inserting, removing, or moving DOM nodes
     * while scrolling.
     * @param {Number} scrollTop
     */
classData.description:
Pushes synchronized scrolling coordinates (startIndex / scrollTop) into all active bodies (bodyStart, body, bodyEnd). Owned here because grid.View is the body orchestrator; the horizontal scroll position is read from the gridContainer macro layer, which retains the ScrollManager.

Preserves the row/cell pooling invariant: each body recomputes view data for a fixed node pool via the silent createViewData(true) path — never inserting, removing, or moving DOM nodes while scrolling.
classData.name: syncBodies
